title: [policy] Bufferbloat avoidance compliance
description: Ensure all code sections comply with spec/appendix-bufferbloat.md. Covers: bounded queues, time-based expiry, priority queuing, explicit backpressure, no silent drops. Each queue location needs a compliance check bead.
notes: Bounded queues verified compliant (2026-07-11): KISS 8-frame limit w/ error return, GATT 8-msg limit w/ QueueFull, Python adapter 64-msg limit w/ False return. Remaining work tracked in children: time-based expiry and priority queuing.
close_reason: Complete: All bufferbloat compliance verified. Bounded queues (KISS 8-frame, GATT 8-msg, Python adapter 64-msg with error returns). Time-based expiry implemented. Priority queuing implemented. Forwarding buffer with backpressure (8 sources x 2 packets/source = 16 max) implemented in Python/Rust/C. No silent drops - all queues return errors. All 6 child beads closed.
